sections.content: At Latitude Zero Cottages Kikorongo, we offer more than just a place to stay.
sections.title: Our Services

sections.content:
Our cottages and rooms are designed for relaxation after a day of adventure.
---
images/IMG_3384.jpeg|Standard Room|A cozy room with comfortable bedding and all essential amenities.|From $45/night
images/IMG_3385.jpeg|Deluxe Room|Extra spacious room with premium furnishings and scenic views.|From $65/night
images/IMG_3388.jpeg|Family Cottage|Ideal for families, offering generous space and a private setting.|From $85/night
sections.title: Comfortable Accommodation

sections.content:
Enjoy freshly prepared local and international meals at our dining area.
---
images/IMG_3383.jpeg|Local Ugandan Cuisine|Freshly prepared traditional Ugandan dishes with local ingredients.|Meals from $8/person
images/IMG_3383.jpeg|International Favorites|A selection of continental dishes prepared to perfection.|Meals from $10/person
images/IMG_3383.jpeg|Refreshments & Drinks|Cool drinks, fresh juices, and beverages available all day.|From $3/drink
sections.title: Delicious Dining

sections.content:
Located just 1km from Queen Elizabeth National Park, we offer easy access to wildlife safaris.
fas fa-binoculars | Game Drives — Morning & Evening
fas fa-ship | Boat Cruises on Kazinga Channel
fas fa-hiking | Nature Walks & Bird Watching
fas fa-camera | Photographic Safaris
fas fa-tree | Chimpanzee Tracking in Kyambura Gorge
sections.title: Safari Adventures

sections.content:

fas fa-shower | Hot Showers | Enjoy hot water anytime
